name: Daily Digest
description: Generate a daily summary of activity and insights
prompt: Generate a brief daily digest summarizing any recent activity, open tasks, and key insights. Format it as a clean Markdown report.

name: Weekly Report
description: Generate a weekly performance and progress report
prompt: Generate a weekly progress report covering completed tasks, ongoing work, and recommendations for the coming week. Format it as a professional Markdown report aligned with Gignaati's 3E framework.
